description: Groq (OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions) streaming (text-only) handcrafted contract fixture. Validates canonical v3 text blocks, response-metadata, and finish mapping.

source.notes: Handcrafted fixture because upstream AI SDK does not ship Groq `*.chunks.txt` captures.

notes: This scenario intentionally uses only OpenAI Chat Completions chunk events (no Responses API events).
